promptDescription: - **candlestick** — OHLC price chart for financial or price-range data over time periods. Spec: { "type":"candlestick", "title":"...", "data":[{"x":"2023-Q1","open":10.50,"high":15.00,"low":8.20,"close":12.80}] }
renderScript: function(wrap,spec){var C=['#534AB7','#7F77DD','#2E9CDB','#4BC1A8','#E8833A','#E85858','#9B59B6','#27AE60','#F39C12','#1ABC9C','#3498DB','#E74C3C','#2ECC71','#F1C40F','#8E44AD'];function getT(){return{text:'#1a1a18',text2:'#5a5a56',grid:'rgba(0,0,0,0.06)'};}function load(url,g,cb){if(window[g]){cb();return;}for(var i=0;i<document.scripts.length;i++){if(document.scripts[i].src===url){if(document.scripts[i]._ld){cb();return;}document.scripts[i].addEventListener('load',cb);return;}}var s=document.createElement('script');s.src=url;s.onload=function(){s._ld=true;cb();};document.head.appendChild(s);}load('https://cdn.plot.ly/plotly-2.35.2.min.js','Plotly',function(){if(!wrap.style.height)wrap.style.height='420px';wrap._chartSpec=spec;var t=getT();var layout={paper_bgcolor:'#ffffff',plot_bgcolor:'#ffffff',font:{family:'Segoe UI, system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif',color:t.text,size:12},margin:{t:spec.title?44:20,r:20,b:60,l:70},showlegend:true,legend:{font:{color:t.text,size:11}},xaxis:{type:'category',rangeslider:{visible:false},gridcolor:t.grid,tickfont:{color:t.text2,size:11},linecolor:t.grid,zerolinecolor:t.grid},yaxis:{gridcolor:t.grid,tickfont:{color:t.text2,size:11},linecolor:t.grid,zerolinecolor:t.grid}};if(spec.title)layout.title={text:spec.title,font:{color:t.text,size:13},x:0.5};var rows=spec.data||[];var traces=[{type:'candlestick',x:rows.map(function(d){return d.x||d.date||d.period;}),open:rows.map(function(d){return d.open;}),high:rows.map(function(d){return d.high;}),low:rows.map(function(d){return d.low;}),close:rows.map(function(d){return d.close;}),increasing:{line:{color:C[0]}},decreasing:{line:{color:'#E85858'}}}];Plotly.newPlot(wrap,traces,layout,{responsive:true,displayModeBar:false});window.addEventListener('resize',function(){try{Plotly.relayout(wrap,{});}catch(_){}});});}
